nodes.categoryHTML:
Tools

Helper tools to add annotations to existing code
nodes.itemHTML: • autotypingstars67 - Automatically add simple return type annotations for functions (bool, None, Optional).

• Vue3-Starterstars13 A boilerplate with an opinion on how to structure your files/folders with a few examples such as Vue Router navigation guards, theming with TailwindCSS, form validation w/ Vuelidate, localization with Fluent, etc.
